title: 10 Dining Room Finds: Organic Modern for Under $800
excerpt: Organic modern dining rooms feel sculptural and warm at once — curved chairs, raw wood, stone-look tableware, and soft ambient light. These 10 finds get you there for under $800 total.
author: At Home Plans Team

pinterestPins.headline: Organic Modern Dining Room
pinterestPins.subCopy: 10 finds for a sculptural, warm table setting

pinterestPins.headline: The Table + Chair Edit
pinterestPins.subCopy: Curved forms, raw wood, warm neutrals

pinterestPins.headline: Stone-Look Tableware
pinterestPins.subCopy: The finishing touch that elevates every meal

pinterestPins.headline: Dining Room Under $800
pinterestPins.subCopy: Start with these 10 organic modern picks

body:
Organic modern is the dining room aesthetic that makes every meal feel like an event — without being precious about it. The formula: a raw-edge or live-edge wood table, curved dining chairs in boucle or linen, a sculptural pendant overhead, and tableware that looks like it was pulled from the earth. The palette stays warm and muted: warm white, sand, clay, and the occasional dusty olive. Every piece looks intentional; nothing looks matchy. These 10 finds build that complete dining room for under $800.

## Shop the List

- [Live-Edge or Raw Wood Dining Table](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-79813629)
- [Curved Boucle Dining Chair (Set of 2)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-86021045)
- [Plug-In Rattan or Woven Pendant Light](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-86872014)
- [Stone-Look Stoneware Dinner Set (4-Piece)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-91201554)
- [Linen Tablecloth (Warm White or Sand)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-84721033)
- [Woven Placemat Set](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-83914102)
- [Ceramic Pitcher or Carafe](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-88410025)
- [Beeswax Taper Candles + Simple Holders](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-82082692)
- [Low Centerpiece Bowl (Stone or Ceramic)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-94685951)
- [Jute or Sisal Runner](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-82201445)

---

*Getting the dining table size right requires knowing your room dimensions. A scaled dining room floor plan prevents the too-big-table mistake. Browse downloadable dining room plans at [athomeplans.com](https://athomeplans.com).*
